name: Harrison Chase
bio: CEO of LangChain. Building the open-source framework for LLM-powered applications — agents, chains, and retrieval.

name: Ramin Hasani
bio: CEO & Co-founder of Liquid AI. Invented Liquid Neural Networks at MIT CSAIL. Building compact, efficient foundation models.

name: Alexander Amini
bio: CSO & Co-founder of Liquid AI. Creator of MIT 6.S191 (Introduction to Deep Learning). Research on robust autonomous systems.

name: Mathias Lechner
bio: CTO & Co-founder of Liquid AI. Co-invented Liquid Neural Networks. Expert in neural ODEs and continuous-time models.

name: Martin Camacho
bio: Co-founder of Suno AI. Building AI music generation — anyone can make a song with just text. Previously at Kensho (S&P Global).

name: Jonathan Frankle
bio: Chief Scientist at Databricks. Creator of the Lottery Ticket Hypothesis. Previously led MosaicML (acquired by Databricks). Harvard/MIT.

name: Andrej Karpathy
bio: Building Eureka Labs — AI-native education. Created nanoGPT and built neural networks from scratch on YouTube. Previously Director of AI at Tesla, founding member of OpenAI.

name: Simon Willison
bio: Creator of Datasette and the llm CLI tool. Django co-creator. Building open-source tools for exploring data and working with LLMs.

name: Guillermo Rauch
bio: CEO of Vercel. Built v0 — AI-powered UI generation from natural language. Created Next.js, Socket.io. Pushing the frontier of AI-assisted development.

name: Shreya Shankar
bio: PhD at UC Berkeley. Building DocETL — AI-powered data processing pipelines. Research on ML data quality and LLM evaluation.

name: George Hotz
bio: Founder of comma.ai (self-driving) and tinygrad (tiny neural network framework). Building simple, fast, open-source AI infrastructure.

name: Jason Wei
bio: Research Scientist at OpenAI. Invented chain-of-thought prompting. Previously at Google Brain. Making language models reason step by step.

name: Emad Mostaque
bio: Founder of Stability AI, the company behind Stable Diffusion. Championed open-source generative AI and democratized image generation.

name: Alexandr Wang
bio: Founder and CEO of Scale AI. Built the data infrastructure powering AI at OpenAI, Meta, and the US military. Youngest self-made billionaire.

name: Clem Delangue
bio: Co-founder and CEO of Hugging Face, the GitHub of machine learning. Built the open-source platform hosting 500K+ models and transformers library.

name: Daniel Gross
bio: Co-founder of Pioneer Fund. Former Head of AI at Apple and YC partner. Angel investor in GitHub, Figma, Cruise, and Coinbase.

name: Nat Friedman
bio: Former CEO of GitHub. AI investor and builder. Co-leads Pioneer Fund with Daniel Gross. Previously CEO of Xamarin (acquired by Microsoft).

name: Logan Kilpatrick
bio: Member of Technical Staff at Google DeepMind. Former first DevRel hire at OpenAI. Bridges AI research and developer communities.

name: Swyx (Shawn Wang)
bio: Founder of smol.ai and editor of Latent Space, the leading AI engineering podcast and newsletter. Coined the AI Engineer role definition.

name: Jeremy Howard
bio: Co-founder of fast.ai and CEO of Answer.AI. Made deep learning accessible to millions through free courses. Former President of Kaggle.

name: Yannic Kilcher
bio: AI researcher and YouTuber who explains cutting-edge ML papers to 250K+ subscribers. Co-founded OpenAssistant. Makes research accessible.

name: Amjad Masad
bio: CEO and founder of Replit. Building the AI-powered coding platform used by 30M+ developers. Previously at Facebook and Codecademy.

name: Peter Welinder
bio: VP of Product and Partnerships at OpenAI. Built the API platform powering ChatGPT and GPT-4. Previously at Anchovi Labs and Dropbox.

name: Greg Brockman
bio: Co-founder and President of OpenAI. Former CTO of Stripe. Led the engineering efforts behind GPT-4 and ChatGPT.

name: Mira Murati
bio: Founder of Thinking Machines Lab. Former CTO of OpenAI who led the launches of ChatGPT, GPT-4, and DALL-E. Previously at Tesla Autopilot.

name: Alex Ratner
bio: CEO of Snorkel AI. Stanford PhD under Chris Re. Pioneered programmatic data labeling — write functions instead of hand-labeling data.

name: Lukas Biewald
bio: CEO of Weights & Biases (W&B). The experiment tracking platform used by OpenAI, DeepMind, and thousands of ML teams. Previously founded CrowdFlower.

name: Jeremy Nixon
bio: Co-founder of Cleanlab. Building data-centric AI tools to find and fix label errors in datasets automatically. Harvard + Google Brain alum.

name: Marc Pare
bio: Co-founder of Neurala. Building edge AI and lifelong-learning neural networks for visual inspection and robotics. Boston-based since 2006.

name: Jeremy Fiance
bio: CEO of DataRobot. Building the enterprise automated machine learning platform from Boston. Helping companies deploy ML without deep expertise.

name: Hyun Kim
bio: CEO of Lunit. Boston-based AI for cancer detection in medical imaging. FDA-cleared products used in 4000+ hospitals worldwide.

name: Aidan Gomez
bio: CEO of Cohere. Co-author of 'Attention Is All You Need' — the Transformer paper. Building enterprise LLMs from Toronto, with a growing Boston presence.

name: Abid Javed
bio: Co-founder of Run:ai. Building GPU orchestration for AI workloads — fractional GPUs, scheduling, and cluster management. Acquired by NVIDIA 2024.

name: Ali Farhadi
bio: CEO of Allen Institute for AI (AI2) and UW professor. Built YOLO (real-time object detection) and leads AI2's mission to do AI research for the common good.

name: Michael Schmitz
bio: Engineering Director at Allen AI (AI2). Led development of Semantic Scholar, the AI-powered academic search engine used by millions of researchers.

name: Ammad Ahmad
bio: Co-founder of Lexion AI. Seattle-based AI contract management platform. Uses NLP to automate legal document review for enterprises.

name: Dirk Groeneveld
bio: Lead engineer at Allen AI. Built OLMo, the fully open language model with open data, code, and weights. Making LLM research reproducible.

name: Rory Finnegan
bio: Engineering lead at Xnor.ai (acquired by Apple). Built ultra-efficient edge AI that runs deep learning on $5 chips. Pioneer of binary neural networks in Seattle.

name: Max Friedman
bio: Co-founder of Mighty AI (acquired by Uber). Built Seattle's first large-scale training data platform for autonomous vehicles. Now advising AI startups.

name: Suchen Zang
bio: Co-founder of Textio. Seattle-based augmented writing platform that uses NLP to predict how language will perform. Used by Fortune 500 for hiring.

name: Bryan Catanzaro
bio: VP of Applied Deep Learning at NVIDIA. Led teams behind CUDA deep learning libraries, Megatron-LM, and GPU-accelerated AI infrastructure.

name: Soumith Chintala
bio: Co-creator of PyTorch at Meta AI. Building the most widely-used deep learning framework in research and production.

name: Thomas Wolf
bio: Co-founder and CSO of Hugging Face. Leading the open-source movement in NLP and making transformer models accessible to all.

name: Raia Hadsell
bio: VP of Research at Google DeepMind. Pioneer in continual learning, robotics, and representation learning for embodied AI.

name: Robin Rombach
bio: Co-creator of Stable Diffusion and co-founder of Black Forest Labs. Pioneered latent diffusion models for high-resolution image synthesis.

name: Patrick Lewis
bio: Researcher at Cohere. Co-author of RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) and leading work on knowledge-grounded language models.

name: Edward Hu
bio: Researcher at Microsoft. Inventor of LoRA and co-inventor of muP — enabling efficient fine-tuning and hyperparameter transfer for large models.

name: Tim Dettmers
bio: Creator of bitsandbytes and QLoRA. Researcher at UW making large language models accessible through quantization and efficient fine-tuning.

name: Tri Dao
bio: Assistant Professor at Princeton and co-founder of Together AI. Creator of FlashAttention — the IO-aware exact attention algorithm used everywhere.

name: Albert Gu
bio: Assistant Professor at CMU and co-founder of Cartesia. Creator of Mamba and structured state space models (S4) for efficient sequence modeling.

name: Boris Dayma
bio: Creator of DALL-E Mini (Craiyon). Built the viral open-source text-to-image model that demonstrated democratized image generation.

name: Apolinário Passos
bio: Machine Learning Art Engineer at Hugging Face. Building tools and demos that bridge generative AI with creative applications.

name: Junyang Lin
bio: Lead researcher at Alibaba DAMO Academy. Creator of the Qwen series of large language and multimodal models.

name: Yi Tay
bio: Co-founder and CTO of Reka AI. Former Google Brain researcher who led UL2 and Flan-PaLM efficiency efforts.

name: Reiner Pope
bio: Staff Research Engineer at Google DeepMind. Key contributor to PaLM scaling and infrastructure for training trillion-parameter models.

name: Ludwig Schmidt
bio: Professor at UW and co-lead of LAION. Building massive open datasets like LAION-5B that power open-source image generation models.

name: Christoph Schuhmann
bio: Co-founder of LAION. Organized the open-source community effort behind LAION-5B, enabling Stable Diffusion and open generative AI.

name: Chris Olah
bio: Co-founder of Anthropic's interpretability team. Pioneer of neural network visualization and mechanistic interpretability research.

name: Lilian Weng
bio: VP of Research at OpenAI. Known for her comprehensive blog posts that are the go-to reference for understanding ML research.

name: Douwe Kiela
bio: CEO and co-founder of Contextual AI. Former Meta AI researcher building RAG-native enterprise AI systems.

name: Omar Khattab
bio: PhD at Stanford and creator of DSPy and ColBERT. Building programming frameworks for optimizing LLM pipelines beyond prompt engineering.

name: Ofir Press
bio: Researcher at Princeton. Inventor of ALiBi positional encoding enabling length generalization in transformers without position embeddings.

name: Jason Brownlee
bio: Founder of Machine Learning Mastery. Published 20+ books and hundreds of tutorials making ML accessible to practitioners worldwide.

name: Sebastian Raschka
bio: Staff Research Engineer at Lightning AI. Author of 'Machine Learning with PyTorch and Scikit-Learn' and 'Build a Large Language Model From Scratch'.

name: James Briggs
bio: Staff Developer Advocate at Pinecone. Popular AI educator creating content on vector databases, RAG, and semantic search.

name: Nils Reimers
bio: Director of ML at Cohere. Creator of sentence-transformers, the most popular library for computing dense text embeddings.

name: Lewis Tunstall
bio: ML Engineer at Hugging Face. Co-author of 'Natural Language Processing with Transformers' and maintainer of the TRL library for RLHF.

name: Philipp Schmid
bio: Technical Lead at Hugging Face. Building deployment solutions and optimizing transformer inference for production at scale.

name: Sayak Paul
bio: ML Engineer at Hugging Face. Core contributor to diffusers library and champion of efficient diffusion model inference and training.

name: Ross Wightman
bio: ML Engineer at Hugging Face. Creator of timm (PyTorch Image Models), the definitive collection of SOTA vision model implementations.

name: Stella Biderman
bio: Executive Director of EleutherAI. Leading the largest open-source AI research collective building GPT-NeoX, Pythia, and open LLMs.

name: Vinicius Moens
bio: Co-founder of Together AI. Building open-source cloud infrastructure for training, fine-tuning, and serving AI models at scale.

name: Arthur Mensch
bio: CEO and co-founder of Mistral AI. Former DeepMind researcher building open-weight frontier models from Europe.

name: David Ha
bio: Co-founder and CEO of Sakana AI. Former Google Brain researcher pioneering nature-inspired AI and evolutionary model merging in Tokyo.

name: Kanjun Qiu
bio: CEO and co-founder of Imbue (formerly Generally Intelligent). Building AI agents that can reason and code with human-like understanding.

name: David Luan
bio: CEO and co-founder of Adept AI. Former VP Engineering at OpenAI building AI models that take actions on computers.

name: Cristóbal Valenzuela
bio: CEO and co-founder of Runway ML. Building the next generation of creative tools powered by generative AI for video and multimedia.

name: David Holz
bio: Founder and CEO of Midjourney. Previously co-founded Leap Motion. Building the world's most popular AI image generation platform.

name: Dave Rogenmoser
bio: CEO and co-founder of Jasper AI. Built the leading AI content generation platform used by over 100K businesses for marketing copy.

name: Peter Chen
bio: CEO and co-founder of Covariant. Building universal AI for robotic manipulation that generalizes across tasks and environments.

name: Daniel De Freitas
bio: Co-founder of Character.AI. Former Google Brain researcher who co-created LaMDA and built the leading AI character conversation platform.

name: Mustafa Suleyman
bio: CEO of Microsoft AI. Co-founder of DeepMind and Inflection AI. Building frontier personal AI assistants and shaping AI policy.

name: Aravind Srinivas
bio: CEO and co-founder of Perplexity AI. Building the AI-native answer engine that is redefining search with real-time citations.

name: Demi Guo
bio: CEO and co-founder of Pika Labs. Building AI-powered creative video generation tools that turn text and images into cinematic clips.

name: Mati Staniszewski
bio: CEO and co-founder of ElevenLabs. Building the world's most realistic AI voice synthesis and dubbing platform.

name: Dylan Fox
bio: CEO and founder of AssemblyAI. Building state-of-the-art speech-to-text and audio intelligence APIs used by 200K+ developers.

name: Scott Stephenson
bio: CEO and co-founder of Deepgram. Building enterprise-grade speech AI with custom-trained deep learning models for real-time transcription.

name: Victor Riparbelli
bio: CEO and co-founder of Synthesia. Building the leading AI video generation platform that creates presenter-led videos from text.

name: Matthieu Rouif
bio: CEO and co-founder of Photoroom. Building AI-powered photo editing tools that remove backgrounds and generate product images instantly.

name: Mohammad Norouzi
bio: CEO and co-founder of Ideogram. Former Google Brain researcher building state-of-the-art text-to-image generation with reliable text rendering.
